title: Rainbow Buttons
description: Makes menu buttons (options, title screen, etc.) cycle between different colors
body: # | DESCRIPTION | Makes the menu buttons (the gray ones, not text boxes or inventory buttons) have an animated rainbow outline, with a smoother box inside. Also makes highlighting the buttons change the inside color, not a border, to make the rainbow border more visible. # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.20.2-26.1```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with any resource pack editing the button elements. Incompatible with modded buttons that don't use these textures. ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
